title: Human mitochondrial genome with an AT skew track
summary: Add GC content, GC skew, and AT skew tracks to a circular human mitochondrial genome diagram, then configure its ticks, feature labels, and legend.
primaryWorkflow: Circular custom track slots with AT skew

downloads.label: NC_012920
downloads.note: Download the complete human mitochondrial genome as a GenBank flat file and save it as HmmtDNA.gbk, the filename stored in the Gallery session.

downloads.label: Qualifier priority table
downloads.note: Download this repository-managed TSV beside HmmtDNA.gbk for the runnable CLI command.

manualSteps.title: Switch to Circular mode
manualSteps.body: Open gbdraw.app and select Circular mode before adding the mitochondrial GenBank input.

manualSteps.title: Upload the GenBank file
manualSteps.body: Upload HmmtDNA.gbk. The Gallery session uses the human mitochondrial reference record NC_012920.1. Type the <i> tags in the Species field literally to italicize the center label.

media.alt: Circular GenBank uploader with the HmmtDNA.gbk file chip.
media.caption: Upload HmmtDNA.gbk in the Circular GenBank uploader.

manualSteps.title: Set the basic circular layout
manualSteps.body: Set Track Preset to Middle, Label Mode to Out, and Legend Position to Left.

rows: CDS, rRNA, tRNA, tmRNA, ncRNA, repeat_region

operations.title: Track preset selector
operations.body: Open Track Preset and choose Middle.

media.alt: Layout card with the Track Preset menu open and the Middle option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Track Preset in the Layout card and choose the highlighted Middle option.

actions.script: const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app?.adv) app.adv.circular_track_slots_enabled = false;

operations.title: Label mode selector
operations.body: Open Label Mode and choose Out.

media.alt: Labels card with the Label Mode menu open and the Out option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Label Mode in the Labels card and choose the highlighted Out option.

operations.title: Legend position selector
operations.body: Open Legend Position and choose Left.

media.alt: Title and Legend card with the Legend Position menu open and the Left option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Legend Position in the Title & Legend card and choose the highlighted Left option.

manualSteps.title: Set the dinucleotide calculation window
manualSteps.body: Use a 500 nt window with a 50 nt step to show local variation in GC content, GC skew, and AT skew.

media.alt: Dinucleotide content/skew controls set to Window 500, Step 50, and Dinucleotide GC.
media.caption: Set Dinucleotide to GC, Window to 500, and Step to 50.

manualSteps.title: Open Custom Track Slots
manualSteps.body: In the circular layout controls, enable Custom Track Slots and reset to the Middle template to start from the slot order used here.

operations.title: Middle template slot stack
operations.body: Open Custom Track Slots and reset the stack to the Middle template before adding the AT skew track.

media.alt: Compact Custom Track Slots controls with Reset to Middle highlighted and the Middle preset summary visible.
media.caption: Choose Reset to Middle; the template contains features, ticks, GC content, and GC skew.

actions.script: const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.adv.circular_track_slots_enabled = true; app.resetCircularTrackSlotsToPreset?.('middle'); }

() => { const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const slots = app?.adv?.circular_track_slots; return app?.adv?.circular_track_slots_enabled === true && Array.isArray(slots) && slots.length === 4 && slots.map((slot) => slot.id).join(',') === 'features,ticks,gc_content,gc_skew'; }

capture.highlightSelector: button[title='Replace the current custom stack with the Middle template']
capture.waitForSelector: button[title='Replace the current custom stack with the Middle template']

manualSteps.title: Add the AT skew track
manualSteps.body: Add another Dinucleotide skew row inside the axis and use it for AT skew rather than the default GC skew.

operations.title: Add AT skew slot
operations.body: Set the added dinucleotide skew slot to AT, label it AT skew, and keep the two custom colors.

media.alt: Custom circular track slot a_skew_2 set to dinucleotide AT with AT skew legend colors.
media.caption: Set the added dinucleotide skew slot to AT and label it AT skew.

manualSteps.title: Move and configure the tick track
manualSteps.body: After adding the AT skew row, use Move inward on the Middle template's Ticks row until it is last in the stack, immediately after a_skew_2. Keep it inside the axis so position labels sit inside the tick marks.

operations.title: Tick track slot
operations.body: Move the tick slot inward to the end of the custom stack and set the tick layout to Labels inside and ticks outside.

media.alt: Custom circular tick slot set to Labels inside and ticks outside.
media.caption: Place ticks after the AT skew slot and keep Labels inside / ticks outside.

actions.script: () => { const slots = window.__GBDRAW_APP__?.adv?.circular_track_slots; return Array.isArray(slots) && slots.map((slot) => slot.id).join(',') === 'features,gc_content,gc_skew,a_skew_2,ticks' && slots[4]?.params?.tick_label_layout === 'label_in_tick_out'; }

manualSteps.title: Prioritize gene labels for CDS features
manualSteps.body: Set qualifier priority for CDS labels to gene so compact labels such as ND1, COX1, ATP6, and CYTB are used instead of long product names.

media.alt: Qualifier Priority controls with a CDS rule prioritizing gene.
media.caption: Set CDS label priority to gene in the Labels card.

actions.script: () => { const rules = window.__GBDRAW_APP__?.manualPriorityRules; return Array.isArray(rules) && rules.some((rule) => rule.feat === 'CDS' && rule.order === 'gene'); }

const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) app.sidebarWidth = 320; const heading = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h4')).find((node) => node.textContent.includes('QUALIFIER PRIORITY')); const section = heading?.parentElement; const row = section?.querySelector('.space-y-1 > div'); if (!heading || !row) throw new Error('CDS qualifier-priority row not found.'); heading.dataset.capture = 'qualifier-priority-heading'; row.dataset.capture = 'qualifier-priority-cds-gene'; row.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' });

manualSteps.title: Generate the diagram
manualSteps.body: Click Generate Diagram. The preview should show the labeled mitochondrial feature ring, GC content, GC skew, AT skew, and a left legend that includes AT skew (+) and AT skew (-).

media.alt: Generated human mitochondrial AT skew preview with the custom track stack and left legend.
media.caption: The generated preview includes the custom track stack and left legend.

manualSteps.title: Inspect a feature
manualSteps.body: Click the RNR2 l-rRNA feature in the interactive SVG and open Details to inspect its label, record, feature type, and location.

media.alt: RNR2 Details popup beside the highlighted l-rRNA feature in the human mitochondrial AT skew diagram.
media.caption: The Details popup identifies the highlighted RNR2 l-rRNA feature and its location.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 1.35; if (app.canvasPan) { app.canvasPan.x = -120; app.canvasPan.y = -40; } }

() => { const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const feature = app?.extractedFeatures?.find((entry) => entry.svg_id === 'fbdb78069'); return Boolean(app?.results?.[0]?.content?.includes("data-gbdraw-feature-id=\"fbdb78069\"") && feature?.gene === 'RNR2' && feature?.product === 'l-rRNA' && feature?.qualifiers?.db_xref?.includes('GeneID:4550')); }

const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const popup = document.querySelector('.feature-popup'); if (!app || !popup) throw new Error('RNR2 feature popup is unavailable.'); if (app.clickedFeature) app.clickedFeature.activeTab = 'details'; popup.style.width = '580px'; if (app.clickedFeaturePos) { app.clickedFeaturePos.x = 12; app.clickedFeaturePos.y = 300; }

() => { const popup = document.querySelector('.feature-popup'); const target = document.querySelector("[data-gbdraw-feature-id='fbdb78069']"); const text = popup?.textContent || ''; if (!popup || !target || !text.includes('RNR2') || !text.includes('l-rRNA')) return false; const popupRect = popup.getBoundingClientRect(); const targetRect = target.getBoundingClientRect(); return popupRect.left >= 0 && popupRect.bottom <= window.innerHeight && targetRect.left >= 0 && targetRect.right <= window.innerWidth && popupRect.right <= targetRect.left; }

postGenerationEdits.title: Review the generated legend
postGenerationEdits.body: Generate Diagram adds AT skew (+) and AT skew (-) to the legend. Use the legend editor only if you want to change their captions or order; the two entries represent positive and negative skew.

media.alt: Legend editor drawer with AT skew legend entries visible.
media.caption: The Legend drawer shows the AT skew entries generated with the diagram.

troubleshooting.title: AT skew is missing from the legend
troubleshooting.body: Check that the added slot uses renderer Dinucleotide skew, dinucleotide AT, and legend label AT skew.

troubleshooting.title: The skew rings overlap labels or ticks
troubleshooting.body: Check that Custom Track Slots are enabled, reset to Middle if needed, and keep GC content, GC skew, AT skew, and ticks inside the axis.

troubleshooting.title: Labels show long product names
troubleshooting.body: Check that the CDS qualifier priority rule uses gene before regenerating the diagram.

troubleshooting.title: The generated diagram differs from the Gallery image
troubleshooting.body: Check input record NC_012920.1, Track Preset Middle, Label Mode Out, Legend Position Left, Window 500, Step 50, AT skew colors, and the tick label layout.
